companies.name: PepsiCo
companies.summary: Supported cross-functional teams by structuring KPI visualization patterns and improving usability within enterprise Power BI dashboards.
bullets: Led UX structuring for KPI and data visualization across global teams.
Improved clarity and usability of enterprise dashboards by standardizing layout patterns, interaction logic, and data storytelling principles.
Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders (product, data engineering, global ops) to align reporting frameworks and reduce interpretation friction.
Contributed to foundational guardrails for scalable analytics experiences across internal enterprise tools.

companies.name: Realtor.com
companies.summary: Played a pivotal role in shaping the user experience across many teams to address the needs of buyers, renters, real estate agents, and coordinators.
bullets: Designed rental search experience improvements and contributed to an AI-powered conversational MVP.
Conducted research, including heuristic reviews and user interviews, to provide foundations for improving the company's online store.
Worked on Upnest CRM to streamline workflows with contextual actions and improved lead segmentation, boosting task completion speed and elevating agent satisfaction and NPS across the funnel.

companies.name: Fanfest.io
companies.summary: As the founding designer and ongoing design consultant, established the core design system and UX/UI direction for FanFest.io, and continue to advise the CEO on strategic design decisions.
bullets: Established core design system and UX/UI strategy — product used by PSG, ManCity, 49ers, NBA, Serie A, Socios, and Sky Sports.
Scaled MVP to millions of fans — drove $3M+ in revenue, secured $5M+ in funding, and co-crafted investor decks with the CEO.
Drove up to 30% paid conversion in early pilots via gamification, AI personalization, and real-time fan experiences.

companies.name: Avail.co
companies.summary: As Lead Designer for the Marketing Squad, owned all customer-facing marketing and conversion pages, researching and crafting user journeys and interfaces.
bullets: Accelerated page update workflow by 84% through a modular component library, boosting conversion by 27%.
Developed a renter-to-home-buyer conversion flow, generating 1,000+ high-quality leads per month.
Revamped onboarding and leasing/payment workflows, reducing churn and enhancing the experience for 700K+ customers.

companies.name: Oi - Brazilian Telecom
companies.summary: Led the foundation of Oi's e-commerce platform and enterprise design system, driving digital transformation for over 48 million customers.
bullets: Launched Oi's first digital sales platform and established a scalable design system, contributing 17% of total company revenue six months after release.
Implemented a standardized QA workflow, tripling deployment speed and significantly improving product release reliability.
Automated 5M+ monthly support tickets with an NLP chatbot — delivering $6M in annual cost savings in partnership with IBM and Meta.

companies.name: Corollarium Technologies
companies.summary: Web-first designer building responsive, modular interfaces, VR/AR simulators, interactive motion-based experiences, and custom CMS platforms.
bullets: Built VR/AR simulators for training, education, and data visualization.
Created interactive experiences including a 360° camera used by Method at Coachella 2018.
Built WebXR immersive educational tools for public institutions.
Custom CMS platform featured at Museum Connections 2016 (Paris).

education.degree: Postgraduate Studies in Communication: Contemporary Culture & New Media Studies
